parsed.title: Attention is all you need

__note: This .raw.json preserves Gemini's attempt-4 output as-pasted, with the placeholder run_id 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4g7h-8i9j-k0l1m2n3o4p5' intact as forensic evidence. The canonical preflight-gemini.envelope.json has the full 30-verdict array and a repaired UUID v4 run_id.
